newsArray.title: CSA Level 2 Refresher Course
newsArray.description: The CSA Level II Refresher Course took place this past weekend, 20 – 22 March 2026, in Oudtshoorn, Recreation Ground. This course is a very important course to help prepare the aspiring Level III Candidates for the CSA Level III Course that will take place later in the year, in September. The CSA Level II [...] The post CSA Level 2 Refresher Course appeared first on The Gremlin .

newsArray.title: Sports News | JJ Smit Set to Lead Namibia in Crucial ICC Men's Cricket World Cup League 2 Tri-series
newsArray.description: Get latest articles and stories on Sports at LatestLY. The 30-year-old Smit has played 52 ODIs and has taken 56 wickets with an average of 21.16 and a best of 26/5. He has also made 1071 runs with the bat at an average of 26.12 and a strike rate of 77.38 with the help of three half-centuries and a best of 94.

newsArray.title: Brendon McCullum to continue as England head coach, says ECB
newsArray.description: Ben Stokes will continue to lead the Test side, with Harry Brook serving as vice-captain, while Rob Key retains his position as managing director of England men’s cricket. The decisions follow an ECB review triggered by a bruising Ashes campaign.

newsArray.title: 'There Is More Clarity In How We Want To Play,' Says Delhi Capitals Skipper Axar Patel As Tigers Set To Roar In IPL 2026
newsArray.description: Delhi Capitals captain Axar Patel said the team is focused on clarity, trust and a positive approach ahead of IPL 2026. Backed by coach Hemang Badani, he highlighted strong team energy and leadership continuity, with the management stressing adaptability and building a competitive squad for the upcoming season.
